summary: Stripe Config Migration Feature - All tests passed. Backend APIs (POST/GET /api/admin/stripe-config, platform/status) working correctly. Frontend Settings page shows Stripe status card with Connected badge for org_admin, Update Stripe Credentials button visible only for org_admin. Non-org_admin users cannot see config options.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Stripe config UI elements working correctly)

seed_data_creation: None - Stripe keys already saved in MongoDB from manual testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe config migration feature fully tested. Keys stored in platform_config collection with key='stripe_creds'. Both server.py and payments.py have get_stripe_creds() that reads from DB first, then falls back to env vars. org_admin can view/update Stripe config via Settings page. Non-org_admin users see Stripe status card but cannot configure it.

backend_api_tests.post_stripe_config_validation: PASS - Requires secret_key, validates key with Stripe API
backend_api_tests.platform_status_stripe: PASS - org_admin sees stripe.connected=true, non-org_admin doesn't see stripe field
backend_api_tests.payments_checkout: PASS - Creates checkout session using DB-stored keys
backend_api_tests.payments_checkout_status: PASS - Endpoint exists and uses DB-stored keys

regular_admin_view.stripe_status_card: PASS - Visible (shows Not Connected since stripe field not in response)
